final:
module dram_cell (  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire enable,  
    input wire [15:0] data_in,  
    output reg [15:0] data_out  
);  
    reg [15:0] memory;  

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
        if (enable) begin  
            memory <= data_in;  // Write data on enable high  
        end  
        else begin  
            data_out <= memory;  // Read data on enable low  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
